ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tms_sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TAP controller sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sequence */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence ended */,
  "ic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IC component being tested */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer responsible for the sequence */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sequence */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence this step belongs to */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed instructions or notes for the step */,
  "tck_cycles_required" INTEGER /* Number of TCK cycles required for the step */,
  "expected_outcome" TEXT /* Expected outcome of the step */,
  "actual_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the step */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the step */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer responsible for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_steps_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES tms_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tdi_signals" (
  "tdi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TDI signal entry */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the step this TDI signal belongs to */,
  "signal_value" TEXT /* Value of the TDI signal (e.g., 'X' for don't care) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TDI signal's purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tdi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tdi_signals_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tms_signals" (
  "tms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TMS signal entry */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the step this TMS signal belongs to */,
  "signal_value" TEXT /* Value of the TMS signal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TMS signal's purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tms_signals_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tck_cycles" (
  "tck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TCK cycle entry */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the step this TCK cycle count belongs to */,
  "number_of_cycles" INTEGER /* Number of TCK cycles required for the step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TCK cycles' purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tck_cycles_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readback_bits" (
  "readback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readback bit entry */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the step this readback bit count belongs to */,
  "number_of_bits" INTEGER /* Number of readback bits required for the step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the readback bits' purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readback_bits_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state transition */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the step this state transition belongs to */,
  "start_state" TEXT /* Starting state of the TAP controller */,
  "end_state" TEXT /* Ending state of the TAP controller */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state transition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_transitions_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_transitions_end_state FOREIGN KEY ("end_state") REFERENCES tap_states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_transitions_start_state FOREIGN KEY ("start_state") REFERENCES tap_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tap_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the TAP controller state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ic_components" (
  "ic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IC component */,
  "ic_name" TEXT /* Name of the IC component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IC component */,
  "revision" TEXT /* Revision number of the IC component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the IC component */,
  "test_requirements" TEXT /* Specific test requirements for the IC component */,
  "last_tested" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last test conducted on the IC component */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the IC component should be tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "ic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IC component tested */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence used for testing */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Pass or fail result of the test */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test result was recorded */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer who recorded the test result */,
  "test_session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test session in which the result was recorded */,
  "test_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_ic_id FOREIGN KEY ("ic_id") REFERENCES ic_components ("ic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES tms_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "ic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IC component where the issue occurred */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence where the issue occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was recorded */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer who recorded the issue */,
  "test_session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test session in which the issue was recorded */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Details of the resolution for the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES tms_sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_ic_id FOREIGN KEY ("ic_id") REFERENCES ic_components ("ic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_test_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engineer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the engineer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the engineer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the engineer (e.g., tester, supervisor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the engineer belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications the engineer holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing session */,
  "ic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IC component being tested */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer performing the test */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the testing session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the testing session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the testing session */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence used in the testing session */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* List of equipment used during the test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES tms_sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_ic_id FOREIGN KEY ("ic_id") REFERENCES ic_components ("ic_id")
)
